description: An engineer needs to prepare a document for the FAA demonstrating that a new avionics system complies with DO-178C standards.

nodes.task_description: Gather all software requirements, design documents, and test results for the avionics system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles all necessary supporting documents.

nodes.task_description: Use a template to generate the compliance report, mapping each requirement to its corresponding design and test case.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a complete traceability matrix and compliance report.

nodes.task_description: Submit the report to the internal certification authority for review before sending it to the FAA.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent follows the correct procedure for internal review.
